subject: Escalation: mainecoon blockers for Perth | Albert Einstein | Q1 review | INIT-8285
body: Following yesterday's call, the mainecoon effort in Perth needs prompt confirmation. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Marie Curie seems to disagree with Albert Einstein on key points due to historical perspectives. Reference initiative INIT-8285. Maintain discretion until the kangaroo, koala, and drop bear urban encroachment assessment is complete. Tracking tags: quality, quality.
